findings.message: protected core/runtime change requires admin-approved:core-change applied by an authorized maintainer or administrator approval
governed change requires docs/changelog/checklist landing evidence or an explicit N/A rationale
governance-critical file changed without authorization; declare governance_touch in the ledger and obtain owner review
Sentrux evidence is recommended for source/workflow/architecture changes (advisory, opt-in).

owner_directive: Fix all four defects tracked in issue #1609: (1) P0 scrub git env (GIT_DIR/--local-env-vars + GIT_AUTHOR_*/GIT_COMMITTER_*) in the hook launcher so gate/pytest children cannot corrupt the shared .git; (2) weakened_ci_check pre-commit base-vs-staged false positive; (3) pre-push ledger discovery branch/finalized filter + --record injection; (4) commit-msg hook wiring so git commit succeeds.

scope_events.reason: Narrow scope to issue #1609 Defect 1 (git-env scrub) + Defect 4 (commit-msg hook wiring) only; Defects 2 & 3 confirmed as downstream symptoms of the Defect-1 corruption (corrupted index / unborn HEAD), not independent bugs, so left unchanged.

Narrow scope to issue #1609 Defect 1 (git-env scrub) + Defect 4 (commit-msg hook wiring) only; Defects 2 & 3 confirmed as downstream symptoms of the Defect-1 corruption (corrupted index / unborn HEAD), not independent bugs, so left unchanged.

Narrow scope to issue #1609 Defect 1 (git-env scrub) + Defect 4 (commit-msg hook wiring) only; Defects 2 & 3 confirmed as downstream symptoms of the Defect-1 corruption (corrupted index / unborn HEAD), not independent bugs, so left unchanged.

Narrow scope to issue #1609 Defect 1 (git-env scrub) + Defect 4 (commit-msg hook wiring) only; Defects 2 & 3 confirmed as downstream symptoms of the Defect-1 corruption (corrupted index / unborn HEAD), not independent bugs, so left unchanged.
Update test_gate_record_hooks.py: the commit-msg hook assertion encoded the Defect-4 buggy wiring (check --mode commit-msg); assert the fixed commit-msg alias entry.
Update ADR-042 runtime spec hook-entry row to document the commit-msg alias and why the bare check --mode commit-msg form must not be used (Defect 4 regression guard).

Declare governance_touch for the owner-authorized .pre-commit-config.yaml change (Defect 4 commit-msg alias + mypy-hook additional_dependencies). Record docs landing (CHANGELOG + ADR-042 runtime spec) and regression-test evidence. Scrub moved from src to the launcher (hook infra, not core).

Add gate_record --no-record flag (cli.py + workflow.py) so the pre-commit/commit-msg git hooks gate without persisting the ledger, fixing the pre-commit-framework 'files were modified' deadlock (#1609); regression tests in test_gate_record.py.
